texto: But that alteration, catastrophic though it was, had long been absorbed into the water table; the unspeakable day still flooded the downs. He wasn't the type to convince himself that facts were not facts, but he needed to stop living intolerable spans again. Surely it was enough to have lived them once.
explicacao: Citação de H.S. Cross sobre sentido da existência e experiência vivida. “But that alteration, catastrophic though it was, had long been absorbed into the water table; the…” articula vida, memory, trauma em registro de vida, com relevância para contextos como trauma e what-is-a-history.
